sex determination dependent on the Tattvas fails miserably.
As we noticed earlier, one way to overcome the difficulty is to
move the Tattvas first forwards, then backwards, next for
ward and so on.
According to the cosmology given in the upanishads and
fortified by the Sankhya and Vedanta, each tattva includes

70 Rectification of Birth Time
· the others, except Akash. Thus Prithivi tattva has half of
Prithivi, while the other half includes the other four tattvas.
This will determine the nature and behaviour of the person
concerned.
Akash tattva is complete in itself. Vayu includes Akash
also. Tejas includes the first two in its second half. J ala in-
cludes in its second half the previous three. ·
Since Moon and Venus are feminine, J ala tattva may refer
to the birth of a female. But what about Prithivi tattva and
Vayu tattva ruled respectively by Mercury and Saturn? Vayu
